---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature, design change, or improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this solve, or what need does it address? Is it related to a
frustration or a gap in the current design?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or approaches you've considered.

## Additional context

Sketches, references, datasheets, links, or any other context that helps explain
the request.
